title: Cradle of the Galaxy
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Cradle of the Galaxy''''' was the name of an exhibit about the era of [[Xim/Legends|Xim the Despot]], before the formation of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], the exhibit was announced by the [[Allied Tion Historical Society]]'s (ATHS) Director [[Alreeda Tion-Hyme]] that it would make a trip to the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].

It contained artifacts from the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]], [[war-robot]]s, [[Beam tube/Legends|beam tubes]], and fragments of a [[jump-gate accelerator]]. Interpretive [[Hologram/Legends|holography]] provided a full-immersion experience, recreating prehistoric vistas such as the epic [[Third Battle of Vontor]].

It was funded by [[Republic Sienar Systems/Legends|Republic Sienar Systems]], the [[House of Tion/Legends|House of Tion]], and the [[House of Cron]].

The tour dates were as follows:
*13:4:1—[[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]]: The [[Cambriele Exploration Auditorium]]
*13:9:1—[[Rhinnal/Legends|Rhinnal]]: [[Rhire Concourse of Humanity and History]]
*14:2:3—[[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]]: The [[Darpa Center of History at Calamar]]
*14:3:1—[[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal]]: The [[Cormond Museum of Arts]]
*14:5:2—[[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]]: The [[Hanna Institute of Antiquities/Legends|Hanna Institute of Antiquities]]
